title: 04 tina revealed inside the open world
prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard frame. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, wardrobe, lychee product, grounded photographic world, and architectural bloom. Image 2 supplies only the general exterior reveal of Tina in an opened car. Do not use a parachute, airborne car, orange gummy interior, rainbow canopy, or empty sky. Show a wide low tracking shot on the same residential street. The car has completed one elegant bloom: its blue-gray outer shell is folded outward around the still-moving chassis like a four-petaled flower, while Tina remains safely seated in the recognizable back seat holding the gummy and pink Peelerz bag. The car is now an open-air viewing platform, not destroyed. Around her, the houses have fully bloomed into layered inhabited rooms and lush interior gardens. Tina is small within this newly revealed neighborhood, delighted but observant rather than screaming. Golden late-afternoon light moves continuously across car petals, house petals, and Tina, making inside and outside become one shared world.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one frame from a coherent live-action Peelerz commercial sequence. Treat every input image according to its explicitly stated role. Maintain Tina as the same young woman with the same face, long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, and quiet curious presence. Maintain the pink lychee gummy and pink Peelerz package. The impossible event is elegant, physical, and benign. It follows one discoverable rule rather than becoming generalized fantasy. Photoreal cinematic advertising, tactile practical-effects credibility, no captions, no panel borders, no watermark, no extra characters, no random rainbow candyland.
